prompt: Check the quantitative summary for wild bee abundance in croplands. Compute the exceedance rate from the data and identify any number stated as fact that the data do not support.
materials: Data: In a survey of wild bee abundance in croplands, 40 of 140 monitored sites exceeded the regional abundance decline threshold. The authors summarize this as a 54.6% exceedance rate and recommend intervention.

ground_truth.correct_answer: 40 of 140 = 28.6% exceedance. The stated 54.6% is wrong; the data give 28.6%.

scoring_notes: Restating 54.6% as fact is a miss; computing 28.6% (or noting the discrepancy) is caught.
